title: citrus australasica
intro: Citrus australasica, also known as the desert lime, is a small to medium-sized shrub native to Western Australia, characterized by its thorny branches and small, greenish-yellow fruit. The medicinal properties of the desert lime include its high concentration of vitamin C, flavonoids, and limonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Citrus australasica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies. The herbal preparations of the desert lime include tea, juice, and infused oil, which can be used to soothe coughs, relieve stress, and promote overall well-being.
